summary_en: 122,000 shares (4.09% of shares outstanding) up to ¥330M. Acquisition window: 15 May 2026 – 28 February 2027. Method: open-market purchases and ToSTNeT-3 block trades on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Stated rationale: flexible capital policy and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice Regarding Resolution on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on Articles of Incorporation pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Regal Corporation's board resolved to acquire up to 122,000 shares of its own ordinary stock, representing 4.09% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury), within a total budget ceiling of ¥330M. The acquisition window runs from 15 May 2026 through 28 February 2027. The company will execute purchases via two methods on the Tokyo Stock Exchange: standard open-market trades and block trades using the ToSTNeT-3 system. The stated purpose is to enable flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions and to enhance shareholder returns. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 265,040 treasury shares against an issued base (excluding treasury) of 2,984,960 shares.
